query:
SELECT 
  qb.id, 
  qb.variantId, 
  qb.variantCode, 
  qb.quantity, 
  qb.unitPrice,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL1 as fobReferencePrice
FROM quotation_batches qb
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON qb.variantId = vp.variantId AND vp.isCurrent = 1
WHERE qb.quotationItemId IN (
  SELECT id FROM quotation_items WHERE quotationId = 90001
)
ORDER BY qb.id;
